description: DB migration sanity: fresh migrate creates all opportunity tables/columns/FKs/permission rows/event-catalog entries; existing clients backfilled to lifecycle_status=active; quotes.opportunity_id FK rejects an orphan insert
DB integration: createOpportunity happy path assigns OPP- number, defaults owner to client account manager, persists values; creation without next_action + due date is rejected (guard case)
DB integration: completing a next action requires supplying the successor (open deal can never lack one) and updates last_activity_at

DB integration: stage derivation — evidence recorded in order advances Identified→Qualified→Assessment→Proposed→Verbal; renewal-typed deal entering at Proposed (skipped checkpoints); declared confidence changes never alter derived stage
DB integration: quote lifecycle drives evidence — linking + sending a quote records Proposed; acceptance records Verbal; an accepted quote matching the assessment mapping records Assessment
Evidence is append-only: correction requires an audit note; no API or action path deletes an evidence row
DB integration: value derivation from accepted quote lines splits MRR (is_recurring), hardware (product kind), NRR (rest); recomputes on quote change; manual edits rejected while a quote is linked

DB integration (critical journey): win flow end-to-end — accepted quote converts to draft agreement, project spawns from template, refs stored, prospect client flips to active, OPPORTUNITY_STATUS_CHANGED + CLIENT_STATUS_CHANGED emitted
Lose requires loss_reason (guard); won-without-quote path succeeds with manual values and no conversion step
Prospect lifecycle: quick-add creates a prospect client; default operational client list query excludes prospects; explicit filter includes them

DB integration: staleness ladder — job flags a deal silent past the nudge threshold (owner notification created), past the interrupt threshold creates the solo-mode ad_hoc calendar block or team-mode escalation notification per settings; thresholds honored from tenant config
last_activity_at updates from a logged interaction and from a quote event on the linked deal (staleness resets)
Work queue assembly: overdue/due actions, stalled deals, and pending suggestions each appear in the correct section; completing an action from the queue prompts for the successor inline
User Activities aggregator includes opportunity next actions as a source with correct due/overdue states
Weekly digest assembles actions due, stalled deals, new suggestions, and wins for a user; per-user toggle suppresses it
Event emission: OPPORTUNITY_CREATED, STAGE_CHANGED, STALLED, and NEXT_ACTION_OVERDUE publish through the domain event builders and match catalogued payload schemas
Default-on methodology workflows are registered and enabled for a fresh tenant (nudge fires without any tenant configuration)

DB integration (high-risk): generator framework — suggestion created with evidence payload + dedupe key; accept creates a prefilled opportunity with provenance; dismissed suggestion does not refire on rerun; snoozed suggestion resurfaces after snooze_until; SUGGESTION_CREATED emitted
DB integration: renewal generator fires at T-days for a contract nearing end, links 1:1 to the renewal work item, prefills MRR from contract monthly value; resulting renewal deal enters mid-ladder
DB integration: T&M generator computes trailing-12 monthly-average spend from billed T&M invoices and fires only above threshold; one-pager view renders the spend-vs-agreement comparison data
Whitespace grid: matrix correctly reflects active contract lines per service category per client; empty-cell click creates a suggestion
Asset aging generator groups qualifying assets (age/warranty/EOL) per client into a single suggestion with asset-list evidence
Generator scheduling: on-demand run executes a single generator and logs fired/deduped counts; scheduled job runs all enabled generators
DB integration: pipeline-by-stage report sums count/MRR/NRR correctly against seeded deals; generator yield report tracks suggestion→accepted→won funnel
Win/loss report includes loss reasons; assessment→agreement conversion counts only deals that passed the Assessment checkpoint
Dashboard widget renders pipeline snapshot and queue summary for the current user
Permissions (guard): user without opportunities.read denied on list/detail action and API; without update denied on mutations; permitted role succeeds
Product gating: AlgaDesk tenant hits upgrade boundary on /msp/opportunities; PSA tenant passes; nav item respects the PostHog flag
EE gating: CE tenant sees no management-layer tabs and gets denied on EE endpoints (forecast, meeting, commitments, QBR); EE tenant sees all; CE core loop unaffected

DB integration: forecast band — floor counts verbal+won only; ceiling weights open deals by evidence stage; per-seller calibration overrides base rates once history threshold met; output is always a band with composition
Calibration metrics: declared-vs-actual close rate, attach rate, and realized-vs-quoted computed correctly from seeded closed-deal history
Meeting mode walks open deals showing evidence-vs-declared gap and days silent; reviewed markers persist per meeting session
DB integration (high-blast-radius): commitments close gate — close-won blocked while an open commitment exists; resolving to a quote line/project task or declining unblocks; resolution refs persisted
Spawned onboarding project surfaces the source deal's commitments and timeline
QBR trigger pack assembles renewal/asset/ticket-trend/whitespace triggers for an account; batch create produces typed opportunities attributed to the QBR for tracking
Seller and office rollups aggregate pipeline and win metrics per attribution rule
Workflow actions opportunities.create/find/update/set_next_action execute via the action registry with schema validation (invalid input rejected)
AI gating (guard): with the AI module disabled, drafting UI is absent and draft endpoints are denied; enabling the module exposes them

Draft flow: generation returns an editable draft (nothing sent); explicit send dispatches via tenant email (mock provider), logs an interaction, and updates last_activity_at; no code path sends without user action
Voice profile: stored samples/steering are included in draft generation context; per-draft tone adjustment alters the request; profiles are per-user
Board drag rules: forward drag beyond a declared checkpoint is rejected; drag to Qualified records the declared checkpoint; drag to Lost requires a reason
REST API: CRUD + suggestion accept happy paths return correct shapes; invalid payload and cross-tenant access rejected (guard)
List performance/pagination: server-side filters (status/stage/owner/staleness) and pagination return correct pages against a large seeded pipeline without value-rollup N+1

Why-sentence composer: given seeded evidence facts (overdue proposal with inbound replies, verbal-then-silent deal, T&M overspend) the composed sentences state the correct facts and update when facts change; lesson strip picks a valid insight from seeded history and falls back gracefully when history is thin
